rows.description: Kidlington Capons & Brawn ad Fst Nat. 1743
rows.notes: Amount values (2 pounds, 15 shillings, 0 pence) are visually confirmed, aligning with gemini-flash's output. gpt-5-mini's interpretation of '62' for pounds and '13' for shillings was incorrect despite its detailed reasoning regarding a '6'. The description 'Kidlington Capons & Brawn ad Fst Nat. 1743' from gemini-flash was visually confirmed as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's reading, which had 'Brown' instead of 'Brawn' and 'Fest Nat' instead of 'Fst Nat'.
rows.english_description: Capons and brawn supplied for the Christmas feast, sourced from Kidlington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Capons and brawn supplied for the Christmas feast, sourced from Kidlington, amounting to £2 15s 0d.

rows.notes: Amount values (20 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence) agreed upon by both extractors and visually confirmed. The description 'Maynherritt pro anno' was constructed by correcting gemini-flash's 'Mayhenritt' to 'Maynherritt' and gpt-5-mini's capitalized 'Anno' to 'anno' based on visual inspection of the original handwriting.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment to Maynherritt, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.notes: All values and description agreed upon by both extractors and visually confirmed.
